    1. HashMapLatencyRecorder(long, long, long, long, long, double[], Time, int)

Class HashMapLatencyRecorder

java.lang.Object
io.perl.api.LatencyRecord
io.perl.api.LatencyRecorder
io.perl.api.LatencyWindow
io.perl.api.LatencyRecordWindow
io.perl.api.impl.MapLatencyRecorder
io.perl.api.impl.HashMapLatencyRecorder
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReportLatencies, ReportLatency
@NotThreadSafe public final class HashMapLatencyRecorder extends MapLatencyRecorder
class for Performance statistics.
